title: Tyler1 LCS Promo
tagline: Teaming up with League's biggest influencer to bring fans back from the pandemic.

body: This was the first live show in two years following the pandemic, held at NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas. Our challenge was to design a set and produce a live experience that could not only fill the stadium but also deliver an unforgettable, high-energy return for fans seeing the LCS in person again.

As the Creative Director for Riot Games Esports, I pitched, led, and oversaw a campaign that positioned Tyler1 as the spokesperson for the Spring Finals at NRG Stadium — overseeing writers, influencer management, internal and external artists, the RFP process, and the stage, lighting, and pyro teams that brought the full vision to life.

Tyler1 is arguably the biggest personality in gaming, making him the perfect partner. He brought unmatched energy both in the promotional film and live on stage, creating a must-see moment that fans couldn't ignore and helping drive massive interest around the Finals.
led: Pitched and led the Tyler1 campaign
Managed writers, influencer talent, and production RFPs
Oversaw stage, lighting, and pyro execution

impact.note: The promotional film drove the highest AMA viewership for an LCS Opening Ceremony in the league's history, with positive remarks from both fans and stakeholders.

next.tagline: Creating a 10-year anniversary spectacle during a pandemic.
